title: orchis pseudosambucina var. markusii
intro: Orchis pseudosambucina var. markusii, also known as the Sambucus orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orchis pseudosambucina var. markusii include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
